name: Basic Guidelines for Making Vegetable Stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose ingredients to reflect the soup in which the broth will be used. A general guideline for making vegetable broth is to use about 8 to 12 cups of vegetables cut into pieces no bigger than 1 inch.
2. Combine these with 2 quarts of cold water in a large, nonreactive pot and add no more than six different herbs.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then lower the heat and simmer for 30 to 45 minutes.
4. Strain the broth and use it as is or concentrate the flavor by simmering to the desired strength (by taste).
